# WebCentauri Technologies

> Reliable technology and digital growth partner for USA & Canada businesses — web development, maintenance, SEO, dedicated developers, and 24/7 emergency support.

WebCentauri Technologies helps small and mid-sized businesses across the United States and Canada build, maintain, secure, optimize, and grow their digital presence. 15+ years experience, 500+ projects delivered, 95% client retention.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of WebCentauri's services, positioning, and trust signals.
- [Services](/services): Website development, maintenance, WordPress, eCommerce, SEO, performance & security, dedicated developers, and emergency support.
- [Industries](/industries): Healthcare, dental, legal, real estate, construction, home services, finance, accounting, manufacturing, eCommerce, professional services, nonprofits.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Transparent USD pricing for website projects, monthly care plans, SEO retainers, and dedicated developers.
- [Case Studies](/case-studies): Real client outcomes across multiple verticals.
- [Resources](/resources): Guides, checklists, and 30 frequently asked questions.
- [About](/about): Story, mission, vision, values, and team.
- [Contact](/contact): Book a consultation, request an audit, or get emergency support.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap of all public pages.
- [Robots](/robots.txt): Crawler directives.
